Decision: HOLD all 7 overrides. Composite distress meta-trigger 0/3 (P&L positive +₹4,747.45 with deepened buffer / no single-name distress / every sector holds ≥10.43 pp cap buffer). Tighten side: zero firing legs on lenient interpretation; the BFSI 3-name cluster and the Auto-related 3-cumulative-admissions are the closest watch but neither fires without an additional admission. The (d-NEW) cumulative reading deserves flagging but firing it would punish disciplined ~5% sizing on a +₹4,747 P&L day. Loosen side: leg (j) profitable-by-EOD precondition broken until another today-admitted name banks profit; leg (k) regressed on both preconditions; leg (l) dormant. Premature loosening with the validation gate broken would skip cost-of-override safety. Re-tightening on disciplined rotation that is producing the calibration's desired outcomes would be punitive.
